images.describes: Low-angle shot of a man in orange-striped shorts crouched setting up a barbell deadlift on dark teal-charcoal rubber gym tiles; moody, landscape, great for text overlay
Man's legs and hands gripping a loaded barbell mid-deadlift setup with yellow wrist straps and blue shoes on dark charcoal tiles; landscape with empty floor space at left
Top-down overhead view of a man's strapped hand gripping a barbell beside his blue shoe on near-black rubber flooring; graphic, lots of dark negative space, landscape
Dramatic black-and-white rear view of a muscular shirtless man doing pull-ups on a rig, back muscles highlighted; portrait orientation, intense mood
Black-and-white rear view of a ponytailed woman with a loaded barbell across her shoulders (back squat) against a black background; landscape, gritty and powerful
Moody black-and-white side profile of a focused woman with a barbell on her shoulders in a dim gym with hanging rope; portrait orientation, cinematic
Rear view of a woman in a white sports bra pressing a plate-loaded barbell overhead at a rack against a dark grey brick wall; landscape, strong and clean
Close-up of a man in a grey tee and black watch lifting a pair of black dumbbells off a rack; charcoal-grey gym tones, landscape, shallow depth of field
Rows of black dumbbells on a rack in a bright daylight gym with a woman training blurred in the background; landscape, airy and clean
Bright white modern gym interior with black-and-red spin bikes, benches and dumbbell racks, no people; landscape, red accents match app palette
Black-and-white empty gym with rows of treadmills, benches and floor-to-ceiling windows onto city buildings; landscape, calm and premium
Close-up of a sprinter in starting blocks holding a relay baton on a red running track in bright sunlight; landscape, red surface echoes app accent color
Three runners silhouetted against a deep blue sky and low sun on an open road at dawn; landscape, aspirational group-cardio mood
Close-up of legs in orange-grey sneakers running up weathered grey concrete stairs; landscape, literal step-climbing motif with a pop of orange
Side view of a braided-hair woman in orange leggings and white top doing crunches on a black mat in front of bright backlit windows; landscape, energetic daylight
Woman silhouetted in a low-lunge yoga pose on a mat by the sea at sunset, pink-and-purple pastel sky; landscape, serene recovery mood
Overhead flat-lay of a colorful vegan bowl — avocado, cherry tomatoes, chickpeas, sweet potato, greens and red cabbage — on rustic grey wood; landscape, vibrant
Rustic flat-lay of a blue ceramic bowl with soft-boiled eggs, greens, tomatoes, radish and avocado on a weathered wooden table with white blossoms; landscape, warm
